posts.author: Soham_Kunkulol
posts.text: After going through the company’s annual reports, investor presentations, conference calls, and other official filings, here’s my understanding of the business. 1. What does the company do? Suntech Infra Solutions is primarily involved in foundation engineering (piling) and civil construction. Around 83% of its revenue comes from executing construction projects, while roughly 16% comes from renting out its heavy construction equipment. Interestingly, the equipment rental business enjoys healthy margins of around 33% , making it an attractive part of the business. 2. Their biggest strength: Own…
